assumptions: The recognised dividend receivable/payable is an intragroup monetary item denominated in a currency different from at least one group entity’s functional currency.
The related foreign exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of the recognised intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The question concerns hedge documentation for the foreign currency component of a recognised intragroup receivable/payable, which maps to a fair value hedge of a recognised monetary item in consolidated financial statements.
